overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character in a dark, neon-lit underground corridor. The character begins seated against a graffiti-covered wall, stands up, and walks through the industrial passage past other NPCs, transitioning from a semi-open area into a deep, shadowy tunnel.

events.description: character stands up from sitting position against the wall

agents.ego_description: sitting against graffiti-covered wall then standing up and beginning to walk forward

notable_agents.action: sitting against wall looking at a device
standing near shop entrance in background

entered.detail: green glowing medical cross sign above shop entrance
concrete wall covered in black graffiti tags and posters
pile of cardboard and trash where character was sitting
lit storefront with people standing outside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered urban walkway at night. The player character sits against a graffiti-covered wall near a pile of cardboard bedding, with a green neon medical sign visible in the background. Around 8 seconds, the character stands up and begins to walk away from the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underground corridor with tiled walls

events.description: moves from semi-open walkway into enclosed underground corridor
lighting shifts from neon green to fluorescent yellow-white

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward a group of distant figures

notable_agents.action: group of figures standing at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: white tiled corridor walls with graffiti tags
long fluorescent light fixture hanging from ceiling
silhouettes of NPCs standing against far wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow industrial corridor with white tiled walls and overhead fluorescent lighting. The camera follows from behind as the character walks toward a group of figures visible in the distance, leaving the neon-lit entrance area behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground passage with NPC gathering against wall

events.description: passes by the group of four NPCs standing against the corridor wall

agents.ego_description: walking past group of NPCs who are standing and conversing against the tiled wall

notable_agents.action: NPC in green sweater and beanie standing against wall
NPC in reflective jacket facing the wall

entered.detail: four NPCs standing in group against the corridor wall
red fire extinguisher mounted on tiled wall
scattered cardboard and debris on concrete floor
large industrial pipe running along wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a group of four NPCs gathered against the tiled wall in the underground corridor. The group includes individuals in a green sweater and a reflective jacket. A red fire extinguisher is mounted on the wall nearby as the character continues walking past them.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep dark tunnel with minimal lighting

events.description: corridor becomes significantly darker with only distant green light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking alone through the increasingly dark corridor toward a distant green light

entered.detail: deep shadowy section of corridor extending ahead
faint green light visible at the far end of the tunnel
metal racks or shelving units along the dark corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking into a deeply shadowed section of the underground tunnel, leaving the NPC group behind. The lighting dims significantly to near darkness, with only a faint green light visible in the far distance and metal shelving barely visible along the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban alcove into the oppressive darkness of a deep industrial tunnel. It begins with the character seated against a graffiti-covered wall beside cardboard bedding under the glow of a green medical sign, before they stand and walk away from the shelter. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow corridor of white tiles and fluorescent overhead lighting, leaving the colorful entrance behind. The camera continues to follow from behind as the character passes a group of NPCs in reflective gear and sweaters gathered near a red fire extinguisher. Finally, the environment descends into heavy shadow, with the bright corridor fading into near darkness where only faint green light and metal shelving are visible in the distance.
